plan_type_rationale: Single line change at orchestrator.ts:483 + regression test + populate verification.

phases.title: Fix default-export false-stale in orchestrator and verify

tasks.description: Read src/pipeline/orchestrator.ts lines 475-497 to confirm exact location of astSet construction and bidirectional comparison
tasks.success_criteria: Exact line numbers confirmed for the fix

tasks.description: At orchestrator.ts line 483, after constructing astSet, add: astSet.delete('default'); — this filters the 'default' pseudo-export that tree-sitter emits for 'export default X' statements before the bidirectional comparison runs
tasks.success_criteria: astSet.delete('default') inserted on the line immediately after astSet is constructed (line 483)

tasks.description: npx vitest run --no-coverage to verify all 1496 tests still pass with the change
Run: node dist/src/cli/populate-coderef.js --project=. --overwrite-headers 2>&1 | tail -20 to rebuild graph.json and verify stale count drops. Then count stale nodes in graph.json.
tasks.success_criteria: Stale count in graph.json drops below 100 (from 1191)

tasks.description: Verify the fix is directional: if headerSet contains 'default' but astSet does not, the mismatch still fires. Confirm by reading the comparison logic after the edit.
tasks.success_criteria: Confirmed fix only suppresses astSet→headerSet direction for 'default'

tasks.description: Commit: fix(pipeline): exclude 'default' from astSet before exports_match_ast comparison

acceptance_criteria: After fix + re-populate: stale count drops below 100 (from 1191)
--overwrite-headers + re-populate produces consistent headerStatus=defined for files with 'export default X'
No regression on header coverage percentage
